title: Protection of Human Subjects in Research Policy
display_label: The Protection of Human Subjects in Research
content: Establishes Morgan State University's commitment to protecting the rights, welfare, and privacy of human participants in research, in accordance with the federal Common Rule (45 CFR 46) and other applicable regulations. Defines the role of the Institutional Review Board (IRB) in reviewing and overseeing all research involving human subjects. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
